creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Oct 25, 2010 at 08:36:42AM -0500, Josh Paetzel wrote:
> I have 7.x and 8.x systems in production using both 3.1.x and 4.1.x with 
> vlans, which leads me to believe this is an issue affecting only HEAD or 
> sparc64.  Unfortunately I don't have any sparc64 systems to test with.

My apologies, I didn't know this PR existed. I updated
net/isc-dhcp41-server with this patch yesterday. Just wanted to make you
aware Josh.

-- WXS
